name: Loop Library
description: A curated, credited collection of AI-agent loops — repeatable workflows for coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI) that iterate until a stopping condition is met.
license: Curation + original loops MIT; linked loops belong to their original authors.

loops.name: The Ralph (Ralph Wiggum) Loop
loops.description: Feed the same prompt to an agent in an infinite shell loop; each pass gets fresh context, state survives in files + git. The origin of loop-driven development.
loops.creator: Geoffrey Huntley

loops.name: autoresearch
loops.description: Point an agent at a measurable script; it proposes a change, runs a time-boxed experiment, keeps it if the metric improves, reverts if not — all night. 66k+ stars.
loops.creator: Andrej Karpathy

loops.name: The Senior Loops
loops.description: Five build loops (spec → plan → test → security → critic) that force AI output to senior-engineer quality. Full text in this repo.
loops.creator: keysersoose

loops.name: The Docs Sweep
loops.description: Review the codebase and bring every doc back in sync with the real implementation.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Architecture Satisfaction Loop
loops.description: Refactor — with live tests and commits each step — until the architecture is genuinely clean.
loops.creator: Peter Steinberger

loops.name: The Sub-50ms Page-Load Loop
loops.description: Optimize until every page loads in under 50 ms.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Production Error Sweep
loops.description: Read production logs, trace each error to its root cause, and fix it.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The 100% Test Coverage Loop
loops.description: Add tests until coverage reaches 100%.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Logging Coverage Loop
loops.description: Add logging until every important path emits useful, tested logs.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Nightly Changelog Loop
loops.description: Each night, summarize the previous day's changes into the changelog.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Test-Suite Speed Loop
loops.description: Make the test suite run as fast as it can.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Repository Cleanup Loop
loops.description: Audit branches, PRs, commits, and worktrees, then tidy up.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Ticket-to-PR-Ready Loop
loops.description: Turn a ticket into a review-ready patch with the failure defined up front.
loops.creator: Hiten Shah

loops.name: The Clodex Adversarial-Review Loop
loops.description: Run a Codex code review and fix every finding above a set threshold.
loops.creator: Lukas Kucinski

loops.name: The Loop Harness Verification Loop
loops.description: Have a second agent session verify the staged work against the criteria.
loops.creator: Istasha

loops.name: The Fresh-Clone Loop
loops.description: Clone into a clean, empty environment and follow the README — to catch setup gaps.
loops.creator: 0xUmbra

loops.name: The LLM Codegen Workflow
loops.description: Brainstorm a spec (LLM asks one question at a time) -> generate prompt_plan.md + todo.md -> feed prompts to the agent in order.
loops.creator: Harper Reed (popularized by Simon Willison)

loops.name: The Multi-File Refactor Loop
loops.description: Plan the change, apply rule-based transforms across call sites, run tests after each, repeat until behavior is preserved and clean.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: The Code Migration Loop
loops.description: Environment-in-the-loop: plan -> set up env -> migrate -> run tests -> refine, iterating until the port passes.
loops.creator: research

loops.name: The Self-Correcting Agent Loop
loops.description: A state-machine loop (LangGraph/CrewAI) with conditional edges: act -> check -> retry, bounded by iteration limits.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: The Mobile Closed-Loop Build
loops.description: Install on a virtual device, tap through every screen, verify layouts across sizes, fix crashes, repeat until store-ready.
loops.creator: Alexander Zanfir

loops.name: The Quality Streak Loop
loops.description: Test realistic scenarios; when one fails, document it and fix it.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Full Product Evaluation Loop
loops.description: Generate N realistic scenarios, each with explicit success criteria.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Self-Improving Champion Loop
loops.description: Iterative optimization with a budget, scoring, and gate checks.
loops.creator: Jose C. Munoz

loops.name: The Devil's-Advocate Loop
loops.description: Argue against your own design — via a critic sub-agent — until it survives.
loops.creator: Anonymous

loops.name: TDAD — Test-Driven Agentic Development
loops.description: Use a code dependency graph for blast-radius before each change; cut agent regressions.
loops.creator: research

loops.name: Eval-Driven Development (LLM-as-Judge)
loops.description: Write evals first -> change -> run evals -> integrate; route flagged production traces back into a golden dataset.
loops.creator: Eugene Yan (& community)

loops.name: Pre-Commit Guard
loops.description: A hook that runs the test suite before every commit and blocks the commit while the suite is red.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: Post-Edit Test Guard
loops.description: A hook that runs the related tests after each file edit to catch regressions immediately.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: Independent Verifier Pass
loops.description: When the implementer claims done, a separate verifier runs build + lint + tests with no access to the implementer's rationale.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: OPRO (Optimization by PROmpting)
loops.description: Feed the LLM prompts paired with their scores; it generates better variants, iterating toward higher accuracy.
loops.creator: Google DeepMind (Yang et al.)

loops.name: TextGrad
loops.description: Textual gradient descent — an LLM proposes edits that reduce a textual loss, backpropagated through your pipeline.
loops.creator: Stanford (Yuksekgonul et al.)

loops.name: DSPy
loops.description: Program prompts as modules with signatures; a compiler optimizes them against a metric instead of you hand-tuning.
loops.creator: Stanford NLP (Khattab et al.)

loops.name: PromptBreeder
loops.description: Evolutionary search that mutates and breeds prompts, selecting by fitness across generations.
loops.creator: Google DeepMind (Fernando et al.)

loops.name: The AI Scientist
loops.description: Autonomous loop: generate research ideas, run experiments, analyze results, write the paper.
loops.creator: Sakana AI (Lu et al.)

loops.name: Agentomics-ML
loops.description: Autonomous ML experimentation loop for genomic/transcriptomic data.
loops.creator: research

loops.name: Deep Research Loop
loops.description: Planner -> search sub-agents -> synthesize -> need more? -> loop until coverage is sufficient, then cite.
loops.creator: LangChain (Open Deep Research)

loops.name: The MLOps Retraining Loop
loops.description: Monitor for drift -> when it exceeds threshold, retrain -> compare vs current -> ship only if better -> keep monitoring.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: The AI Red-Teaming Loop
loops.description: Adversarially attack the system (prompt injection, jailbreaks, data leakage), feed results back, re-test on a schedule/CI.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: RvB — Iterative Red-Blue Games
loops.description: Automate system hardening through repeated red-team-attacks / blue-team-defends rounds.
loops.creator: research

loops.name: Self-Refine
loops.description: One LLM drafts, critiques its own draft, then revises — looping until a stopping criterion. ~20% avg gains.
loops.creator: Madaan et al.

loops.name: Draft -> Critique -> Finalize
loops.description: Force deliberation: generate an idea, critique it against criteria, regenerate from the critique.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: LLM Peer Review
loops.description: Multiple agents review each other's drafts, then privately revise — distributed critique for creative writing.
loops.creator: research

loops.name: Chain of Density
loops.description: Iteratively rewrite a summary, fusing in missing entities each pass without growing the length — denser every loop.
loops.creator: Adams et al.

loops.name: The SEO/GEO Visibility Loop
loops.description: Audit crawlability, indexation, and structured data.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Product Update Podcast Loop
loops.description: Generate a short 3-5 minute podcast episode about new features.
loops.creator: Pierson Marks

loops.name: War Loops: Autonomous Frontend Designer
loops.description: Point it at a URL or image and produce iterative design builds.
loops.creator: Swayam

loops.name: The Boeing 747 Benchmark
loops.description: Build the most realistic Boeing 747 you can in Three.js — a model-capability benchmark.
loops.creator: @victormustar

loops.name: The Infinite Clickbait Loop
loops.description: Generate ten thumbnail concepts and score each against a rubric.
loops.creator: @Alex_FF

loops.name: The Three.js Game Loop
loops.description: Build a playable loop first, then iterate (playtest -> tweak -> re-test) until it passes gameplay, visual, perf & release checks.
loops.creator: majidmanzarpour

loops.name: The a11y Audit Loop
loops.description: Scan for WCAG violations, apply remediation hints, re-scan until compliant. (Automated tools catch ~30-40% — pair with manual testing.)
loops.creator: snapsynapse

loops.name: Accessibility Review Agents
loops.description: Specialist agents that enforce WCAG 2.2 AA so coding agents stop generating inaccessible code.
loops.creator: Community-Access

loops.name: The Text-to-SQL Self-Correction Loop
loops.description: Creator generates SQL -> Runner executes -> Enhancer critiques -> regenerate, until the query is executable and semantically correct.
loops.creator: Rudder Analytics

loops.name: The Stale-Safe Batch Release Loop
loops.description: Exclude stale/unfinished work, combine the valid changes, and release.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Production Data Cleanup Loop
loops.description: Remove anything that doesn't meet the allowed definition.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Post-Release Baseline Loop
loops.description: Run the standard benchmarks and record the results.
loops.creator: Matthew Berman

loops.name: The Customer AI Deployment Loop
loops.description: Manage one customer AI deployment from priority to production.
loops.creator: AgentLed.ai

loops.name: The Terraform Fix Loop
loops.description: validate -> plan -> apply -> verify — read the error, fix, re-run until the infra is correct. Constrain scope.
loops.creator: community

loops.name: Ship PR Until Green
loops.description: Implement on a branch, run tests, push, open a PR, wait for CI, and loop until checks pass and it's merge-ready.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: CI Failure Watcher
loops.description: Poll CI on an interval; when checks go red, investigate and push fixes until green.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: Deploy Verification Loop
loops.description: After a deploy, hit health + smoke endpoints on an interval until everything returns healthy.
loops.creator: elorm

loops.name: Aider
loops.description: Pair-programming loop with an architect -> editor two-model mode; edits via diffs, runs against a tree-sitter repo map.
loops.creator: Paul Gauthier

loops.name: SWE-agent
loops.description: Agent-computer-interface loop that reads an issue, edits the repo, runs tests, and iterates to a patch.
loops.creator: Princeton NLP

loops.name: OpenHands (ex-OpenDevin)
loops.description: Multi-agent delegation loop: plan -> act -> observe across a dev environment.
loops.creator: All-Hands-AI

loops.name: AutoGPT
loops.description: The original autonomous goal loop: decompose a goal into tasks and execute them until the objective is met.
loops.creator: Significant-Gravitas

loops.name: BabyAGI
loops.description: Task-creation/prioritization/execution loop backed by a vector store of prior results.
loops.creator: Yohei Nakajima

loops.name: loop-engineering
loops.description: Patterns, starters & CLI tools (loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost) for loop engineering.
loops.creator: Cobus Greyling

loops.name: autoloop
loops.description: Agent-agnostic iterative-optimization loops for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Gemini CLI.
loops.creator: Arm Gabrielyan

loops.name: agentic-loop
loops.description: Autonomous Claude Code toolkit based on RALPH + PRD-driven development.
loops.creator: allierays

loops.name: agent-loop
loops.description: A guide + workflows for orchestrating specialized AI personas to build, test, and deploy in a loop.
loops.creator: Saik0s

loops.name: ralph
loops.description: An autonomous loop that runs until every item in a PRD is complete.
loops.creator: snarktank

loops.name: ralph-claude-code
loops.description: A Ralph loop for Claude Code with intelligent exit detection.
loops.creator: Frank Bria

loops.name: codex-autoresearch-harness
loops.description: Bash harness to run Karpathy's autoresearch with Codex CLI + an A/B framework.
loops.creator: SarahXC

loops.name: autoresearch-guide
loops.description: 3,000+ line guide teaching agents to autonomously optimize anything measurable.
loops.creator: Rkcr7

loops.name: awesome-autoresearch
loops.description: A curated list of autoresearch resources.
loops.creator: yibie

loops.name: ReAct
loops.description: Interleave Thought -> Action -> Observation so reasoning guides tool use and vice versa.
loops.creator: Yao et al.

loops.name: Reflexion
loops.description: Actor + Evaluator + Self-Reflection; verbal self-feedback stored in memory across trials. 91% pass@1 on HumanEval.
loops.creator: Shinn et al.

loops.name: Evaluator-Optimizer
loops.description: Generator proposes, evaluator scores, loop until a quality threshold — the generic critic loop.
loops.creator: Anthropic, Building Effective Agents

loops.name: Self-Consistency / Tree of Thoughts
loops.description: Sample many reasoning paths / search a tree of thoughts, then select the best.
loops.creator: Wang et al. / Yao et al.

loops.name: Agent Design Pattern Catalogue
loops.description: A catalogue of architectural patterns for foundation-model agents.
loops.creator: Liu et al.
